Setlist
Shows with 6+ Songs at 10:00 or Longer
This is a list of all shows where DMB played six or more songs that were longer than ten minutes. As always, there are hundreds of shows without tapes, most from the early days. But as you can see below, it's unlikely early shows would cross this mark. The first show isn't until 1997 and was driven by guests. It would take until Before These Crowded Streets and five songs that regularly cross 10:00 live for this to become more common.

By the numbers:

Total Shows: 46
Shows with 8 songs: 2
Shows with 7 songs: 9
Shows with 6 songs: 34

Earliest show: 6.6.1997 - SPAC
Latest show: 7.23.22 - Virginia Beach

39 different songs over 10 minutes in the 46 shows below, the most common being Crush at 29 of the shows.

The shows below are default sorted by # of songs over 10-minutes, then chronological order.
#  Show Date Location Songs   
809.03.06George, WAJimi Thing (18:11), The Last Stop (16:47), Lie in Our Graves (16:05), The Dreaming Tree (14:50), Typical Situation (14:21), Loving Wings (13:09), Crush (12:47), & All Along the Watchtower (10:36)
